summary: Iteration 108: Public Portfolio Page + Inquiry Form testing complete. All backend API tests passed (10/10). Frontend portfolio and inquiry pages fully functional with brand-adaptive design, PHOTOGRAPHY-specific fields, and proper navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu button is 36x36px, slightly below 44px minimum touch target

action_items: Consider increasing mobile menu button padding to meet 44px touch target (currently 36x36px)
seed_data_creation: Created test leads via inquiry form submission during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 108 tested public portfolio and inquiry pages. Portfolio page at /portfolio/:userId uses warm light background (#F9F7FE), shows creator brand colors, has sticky nav with Work/Contact links, hero section, empty state for no portfolio items, inquiry CTA section, and 'Powered by KOLOR Studio' footer. No mailto:contact@example.com anywhere. Inquiry page at /inquiry?studio=:userId shows PHOTOGRAPHY-specific fields (Type of shoot, Shoot date, Location, How did you find us) when creator industry is PHOTOGRAPHY. Generic fallback form shown without ?studio param. Form submission creates lead via POST /api/portal/submit. Success page shows 'Inquiry sent!' heading and 'Back to portfolio' link. 'Book a call' CTA correctly hidden when no meeting types configured.

backend: GET /api/portfolio/public/:userId returns brand fields (brandPrimaryColor, brandAccentColor, brandFontFamily, brandLogoUrl, industry, speciality, studioName, businessName, firstName, lastName)
GET /api/book/:userId returns user brand info and meeting types array
POST /api/portal/submit creates lead with all fields
POST /api/portal/submit validates required fields (returns 400 for missing clientName)
frontend: Portfolio page loads at /portfolio/:userId with warm light background (#F9F7FE)
Portfolio nav bar shows creator's brand initials (S for Sarah) and Work/Contact links
Portfolio hero section shows studio name (KOLOR STUDIO) and 'Work with me' CTA
Portfolio 'Book a call' CTA correctly hidden when no meeting types exist
Portfolio CTA section has 'Send an inquiry' link to /inquiry?studio=:userId
Portfolio footer shows 'Powered by KOLOR Studio' - no mailto:contact@example.com
Inquiry page at /inquiry?studio=:userId loads with two-column layout
Inquiry page fetches creator brand info and displays brand-colored elements (#A855F7)
Inquiry page shows PHOTOGRAPHY-specific fields (Type of shoot, Shoot date, Location, How did you find us)
Inquiry form submission works (creates lead via leadsApi.submit)
Inquiry success page shows 'Inquiry sent!' heading and 'Back to KOLOR STUDIO's portfolio' link
Inquiry page without ?studio param shows generic fallback form with Project Category, Project Type, Project Title, Budget, Timeline
All main buttons meet 44px minimum touch target (Work with me: 48px, Send an inquiry: 50px, Submit: 50px)
Navigation between portfolio and inquiry pages works correctly
Contact anchor link scrolls to inquiry section
